news.title:
Indonesia's BrahMos missile deal may benefit Indian firms like HAL, Data Patterns, Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC Industries.
HAL leads integration; Data Patterns develops systems; Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC supply critical components to BrahMos programme.
news.summary:
Indonesia's BrahMos missile deal may benefit Indian firms like HAL, Data Patterns, Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC Industries.
HAL leads integration; Data Patterns develops systems; Paras Defence, Premier Explosives, and PTC supply critical components to BrahMos programme.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal maintains Buy on HAL with ₹5,500 target, citing higher global defence spending boosting India's opportunities.
Supply chain constraints in specialised components may impact HAL's near-term execution timelines.

news.title:
Hindustan Aeronautics wins ₹2,901 crore Defence Ministry order for ALH Mk III helicopters, boosting Coast Guard capabilities.
HAL shares rose 1.1% to ₹3,956.9 Monday; stock down 6% over a month amid scrutiny issues with Tejas jets.

news.title:
Defence stocks show divergence; PSUs like HAL (-9% YTD) and BDL (-16% YTD) struggle, while private players like Data Patterns (+18% YTD) and Solar Industries (+10% YTD) gain.
Nifty Defence Index gains 4.8% YTD. Analysts highlight elevated valuations, execution challenges, and policy gaps as key factors affecting PSU stocks, favoring private players.
news.summary:
Defence stocks show divergence; PSUs like HAL (-9% YTD) and BDL (-16% YTD) struggle, while private players like Data Patterns (+18% YTD) and Solar Industries (+10% YTD) gain.
Nifty Defence Index gains 4.8% YTD. Analysts highlight elevated valuations, execution challenges, and policy gaps as key factors affecting PSU stocks, favoring private players.

news.title:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.
